channel.title: GitHub Vue Daily Trending
channel.description: Daily Trending of Vue in GitHub

item.title: Lissy93/dashy
item.description: 🚀 A self-hostable personal dashboard built for you. Includes status-checking, widgets, themes, icon packs, a UI editor and tons more!

item.title: qier222/YesPlayMusic
item.description: 高颜值的第三方网易云播放器，支持 Windows / macOS / Linux

item.title: lookscanned/lookscanned.io
item.description: 📚 LookScanned.io - Make your PDFs look scanned

item.title: unovue/radix-vue
item.description: Vue port of Radix UI Primitives. An open-source UI component library for building high-quality, accessible design systems and web apps.

item.title: primefaces/primevue
item.description: Next Generation Vue UI Component Library

item.title: unovue/shadcn-vue
item.description: Vue port of shadcn-ui

item.title: alireza0/s-ui
item.description: An advanced Web Panel • Built for SagerNet/Sing-Box

item.title: umodoc/editor
item.description: Umo Editor is an open-source document editor, based on Vue3 and Tiptap.

item.title: nuxt/ui
item.description: A UI Library for Modern Web Apps, powered by Vue & Tailwind CSS.

item.title: requarks/wiki
item.description: Wiki.js | A modern and powerful wiki app built on Node.js

item.title: DeepSourceCorp/good-first-issue
item.description: Make your first open-source contribution.

item.title: zyronon/douyin
item.description: Vue3 + Pinia 仿抖音，Vue 在移动端的最佳实践 . Imitate TikTok ，Vue Best practices on Mobile

item.title: imsyy/SPlayer
item.description: 🎉 一个简约的音乐播放器，支持逐字歌词，下载歌曲，展示评论区，音乐云盘及歌单管理，音乐频谱，移动端基础适配 | 网易云音乐 | A minimalist music player

item.title: AutomaApp/automa
item.description: A browser extension for automating your browser by connecting blocks

item.title: donaldzou/WGDashboard
item.description: Simple dashboard for WireGuard VPN written in Python & Vue.js

item.title: vbenjs/vue-vben-admin
item.description: A modern vue admin panel built with Vue3, Shadcn UI, Vite, TypeScript, and Monorepo. It's fast!

item.title: doocs/md
item.description: ✍ WeChat Markdown Editor | 一款高度简洁的微信 Markdown 编辑器：支持 Markdown 语法、色盘取色、多图上传、一键下载文档、自定义 CSS 样式、一键重置等特性

item.title: NitroRCr/AIaW
item.description: AI as Workspace - 精心设计的 AI (LLM) 客户端。 全功能，轻量级；支持多工作区、插件系统、跨平台、本地优先+实时云同步、Artifacts

item.title: frappe/crm
item.description: Fully featured, open source CRM

item.title: tiny-craft/tiny-rdm
item.description: Tiny RDM (Tiny Redis Desktop Manager) - A modern, colorful, super lightweight Redis GUI client for Mac, Windows, and Linux.
